task_completion.description: The clinical photograph is loaded into Weasis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'clinical_photo.jpg' in the Weasis import dialog, thumbnail explorer, or recently opened files list.

task_completion.description: The Weasis workspace is configured in a 1x2 side-by-side layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main viewing area in Weasis being split into exactly two vertical panels (one row, two columns).

task_completion.description: The CT scan is displayed in the left panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the grayscale radiological CT scan actively displayed in the left panel of the 1x2 layout.

task_completion.description: The clinical photograph is displayed in the right panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the clinical photograph actively displayed in the right panel of the 1x2 layout.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the workspace is exported to the expected path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Weasis export/save dialog pointing to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/multimodal_comparison.png', or a file manager/terminal verifying the file's creation at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis GUI to arrange the images and export the view
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with Weasis menus, layout buttons, and export dialogs rather than terminal commands like 'convert' or 'montage' to stitch images.

integrity.description: The export is a genuine screenshot of the Weasis workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of Weasis's built-in export or screenshot functionality, ensuring the output is not just a direct copy or terminal-based concatenation of the two source files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI task
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at terminal windows to ensure no Python scripts, bash commands, or ImageMagick tools were used to artificially generate the 'multimodal_comparison.png' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The clinical photo is located at /home/ga/Desktop/clinical_photo.jpg. The expected export path for the workspace screenshot is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/multimodal_comparison.png.
